title: stellina
intro: Stellina, also known as Stellaria media, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of stellina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Stellina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
